tables: UPSSSC UP Teacher Cadre (Assistant J.T.C. Teacher) Recruitment 2026 Mains Answer Key

Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has released UP Directorate of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Uttar Pradesh Teacher Cadre JTC Assistant Teacher Advt No. 03-Exam/2026 Recruitment Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this UPSSSC Vacancy 2026 can Download Answer Key. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Practice Test, pay scale and all other information.

Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) Uttar Pradesh UPSSSC UP Assistant Teacher (Special Education) / Teacher Cadre Recruitment 2026 Mains Exam UPSSSC Advt No. : 03-Exam/2026 Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 06/04/2026 Last Date for Registration : 27/04/2026 Fee Payment Last Date : 27/04/2026 Correction Last Date : 04/05/2026 Eligibility Result Available : 16/06/2026 Mains Fees Payment Start : 27/06/2026 Mains Exam Date : 12/07/2026 Exam City Available : 02/07/2026 Admit Card Available : 08/07/2026 Answer Key Available : 13/07/2026
Application Fee General / OBC / EWS : 25/- SC / ST : 25/- PH (Dviyang) : 25/- Pay the Examination Fee Through State Bank of India SBI I Collect Fee Mode or Pay the Exam Fee Through E Challan

How to Fill : UPSSSC UP J.T.C. Teacher Cadre Recruitment Online Form 2026 There are 02 types to apply online for UPSSSC UP Teacher Cadre Post Recruitment Advt No. 03-Exam/2026 Recruitment 2026. First: In this, the candidate will have to login with his personal information, the information that has to be given is: PET Registration Number, Date of Birth, Gender, Domicile and Category. Second : In this, the candidate will have to login through his OTP, the information that has to be given is: UPSSSC PET 2025 Registration Number and OTP Password. After login, the complete information of the candidate, his photo and signature will also be visible, the candidate will have to fill the information related to the post he is asking for and the application fee: Rs.25/- will have to be paid. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Apply Online / Submit Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full UPSSSC Advt No : 03-Exam/2026 Notification Before Apply Online
